name: Shadow the Hedgehog
description:

SONADOW ADULT AU

Who would've thought the hero of mobius could settle down with the one and only Ultimate life-form? After years of marriage you both decided to have a little family and requested Tails to create a baby hedgehog by a fusion of Sonic and Shadow's DNA... It wasn't easy at all but they won't give up
